section_name: Rights and duties of person riding motorized wheelchair on bicycle lane or path
text:
Every person riding a motorized wheelchair on a bicycle lane or path is subject to the provisions applicable to and has the same rights and duties as the driver of a bicycle when operating on a bicycle lane or path, except:

(1) When those provisions which by their very nature can have no application.

(2) When otherwise specifically provided under the vehicle code. [1991 c.417 §3]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 814. Pedestrians
##### § 814.500 — Rights and duties of person riding motorized wheelchair on bicycle lane or path

Every person riding a motorized wheelchair on a bicycle lane or path is subject to the provisions applicable to and has the same rights and duties as the driver of a bicycle when operating on a bicycle lane or path, except:

(1) When those provisions which by their very nature can have no application.

(2) When otherwise specifically provided under the vehicle code. [1991 c.417 §3]

subsections.text: Every person riding a motorized wheelchair on a bicycle lane or path is subject to the provisions applicable to and has the same rights and duties as the driver of a bicycle when operating on a bicycle lane or path, except:
When those provisions which by their very nature can have no application.
When otherwise specifically provided under the vehicle code. [1991 c.417 §3]
